bird.name: Black hornbill
bird.summary: The black hornbill (Anthracoceros malayanus) is a species of bird of the hornbill family Bucerotidae. It lives in Asia in Brunei Darussalam…

relations.subject: Black hornbill
relations.evidence: 'durian bird'). It also has a role in seed disbursement for Vitex pinnata. It is known to fly for hours at a time. It is threatened by hunting and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
